data.title: ImpediMed Unaffected by New U.S. Tariffs
data.description:
Impedimed Limited ( (AU:IPD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ImpediMed Limited has announced that the recent U.S. tariffs on imports are not expected to have a significant impact on its business or supply chain in the short to medium term. The company’s SOZO device is manufactured in the U.S. with many components sourced locally, and it maintains a sufficient inventory to mitigate potential supply chain disruptions. ImpediMed will continue to monitor the situation and update stakeholders if necessary.

More about Impedimed Limited

ImpediMed Limited, founded in Brisbane, Australia, is a medical technology company that specializes in bioimpedance spectroscopy (BIS) technology to enhance patient health. The company produces the SOZO Digital Health Platform, which is FDA-cleared, CE-marked, and ARTG-listed for various indications, including lymphoedema and heart failure. ImpediMed operates in the US and European markets, focusing on cancer-related lymphoedema with a SaaS subscription-based business model.

YTD Price Performance: -50.0%

Average Trading Volume: 63,968

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $48.14M

data.title: Karman Holdings Reports Record 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Karman Holdings Inc. ( (KRMN) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Karman Holdings Inc. presented to its investors.

Karman Holdings Inc., operating under the name Karman Space & Defense, is a prominent player in the aerospace and defense sector, specializing in the rapid design and production of advanced technologies for hypersonic, missile defense, UAV, and space systems. The company is recognized for its innovative solutions that address near-peer nation-state threats.

In its fiscal year 2024 earnings report, Karman Holdings Inc. announced record-breaking financial results, with a notable 23% increase in revenue, reaching $345.3 million. The company’s net income also saw a significant rise of 191.3%, amounting to $12.7 million. These achievements underscore Karman’s robust performance across its various market segments.

Key financial metrics highlighted in the report include a record adjusted EBITDA of $106.1 million, reflecting a 29.7% year-over-year growth. The company also reported a substantial funded backlog of $579.8 million, indicating strong future revenue visibility. Additionally, Karman successfully completed a $581.9 million IPO in early 2025, raising $173.2 million in net proceeds, and refinanced its debt to improve financial flexibility.

Strategically, Karman expanded its capabilities by acquiring MTI, aiming to enhance its design and manufacturing strengths and broaden its customer base. The company’s growth in the hypersonics, space, and missile defense sectors was driven by increased government spending and new program developments, positioning it well for continued success.

Looking ahead, Karman Holdings Inc. projects a positive outlook for 2025, with expected revenue between $423 million and $433 million. The company remains confident in its ability to achieve these targets, supported by its strong backlog and strategic initiatives to meet evolving market demands.

data.title: WD-40 Company Reports Strong Q2 2025 Results
data.description:
WD-40 Company ( (WDFC) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information WD-40 Company presented to its investors.

WD-40 Company, a global marketing organization, is renowned for its maintenance products that solve everyday problems in workshops, factories, and homes worldwide. The company operates primarily in the consumer goods sector and is headquartered in San Diego, California.

In its second fiscal quarter of 2025, WD-40 Company reported a 5% increase in total net sales, reaching $146.1 million. This growth was primarily driven by a 6% rise in maintenance product sales. The company also revised its fiscal year 2025 guidance upward for gross margin and earnings per share (EPS).

Key financial highlights include an 11% increase in operating income to $23.3 million and a significant 92% rise in net income to $29.9 million, attributed to a favorable income tax adjustment. Excluding this one-time benefit, net income still saw a 15% increase. The company’s gross margin improved to 54.6%, and diluted EPS rose to $2.19 from $1.14 in the previous year.

Regionally, the EIMEA segment showed the strongest growth with a 10% increase in net sales, while the Americas saw a 3% rise. The Asia-Pacific region experienced a slight decline in sales, but signs of recovery were noted. The company also announced plans to divest its homecare and cleaning product portfolios in the Americas and the UK.

Looking ahead, WD-40 Company remains optimistic about its growth trajectory, projecting net sales growth between 6% and 11% for the fiscal year. The company anticipates a gross margin between 55% and 56% and expects diluted EPS to range from $5.25 to $5.55, reflecting continued confidence in its strategic initiatives and market performance.

data.title: Washington H. Soul Pattinson Announces Director’s Share Acquisition
data.description:

More about Washington H. Soul Pattinson and Co. Ltd.

data.title: bettermoo(d) Announces $400,000 Private Placement to Boost Operations
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Happy Supplements Inc. ( (TSE:MOOO) ).

bettermoo(d) Food Corporation has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 1,818,182 units at $0.22 per unit, aiming to raise up to $400,000. The proceeds will support existing operations and general working capital. The private placement is expected to close around April 16, 2025, subject to regulatory approvals, and includes a statutory hold period for issued securities. This move is part of bettermoo(d)’s strategy to strengthen its financial position and continue its growth in the plant-based dairy alternative market.

More about Happy Supplements Inc.

bettermoo(d) Food Corporation is an innovative plant-based dairy alternative food and beverage company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. The company is known for launching Moodrink™, a nutritious dairy alternative beverage that mimics the taste of traditional milk from the Alps regions of Switzerland, France, and Austria. bettermoo(d) aims to produce sustainable and nutritious dairy alternative products, including Moogurt and Buetter, that are good for both people and the planet.

data.title: Acrux Limited Announces Registry Office Relocation
data.description:
Acrux Limited ( (AU:ACR) ) has issued an announcement.

Acrux Limited announced a change in the address of its registry office in Sydney, effective from April 14, 2025. The registry, managed by MUFG Corporate Markets (AU) Limited, will relocate to Liberty Place, Level 41, 161 Castlereagh St, Sydney. This change is part of the company’s ongoing operational adjustments and does not affect contact details, ensuring continuity for stakeholders.

More about Acrux Limited

Acrux Limited is a specialty pharmaceutical company with a robust history in developing and commercializing topically applied pharmaceutical products. With 25 years of experience, the company has successfully marketed products globally, particularly in the United States. Acrux focuses on formulating and developing a range of topical generic products, leveraging its skilled workforce and facilities to deliver affordable solutions. The company is open to collaboration and commercial partnerships.
